First paragraph here.

Test typography transformations

He said "this is important" and she agreed.

The change was made -- and it worked... eventually.

So let's rename it to 'remote_repo_uptodate()' and call it done.

For example:

	[torvalds@i7 test-tlb]$ ./test-tlb 16k 12
	  1.29ns (~5.0 cycles)

the *common* git save situation is that we save locally.

> I think we should fix this.
> It seems broken.

We do this by:

 (a) generating a mask

 (b) checking the subset

 (c) compressing indexes
